tdd_red_tests.summary: Added 35 RED webhook/control REST tests covering webhook key create/invoke/list/rotate/revoke, query and header credentials, no-target open_agent, alias resolution, rate limit and denial precedence, UI-auth-only MCP control config and mutation APIs, agent profile validation, sessions/search/reply/close endpoints, one-time secret exposure, redaction, includeSelf default, deferred close_self failure notification, and close confirmation nonce shape. Expected RED verified: server test-runner exits 1 with 35 missing WebhookInvocationService/McpControlService failures; build passed; git diff check passed; final TDD review No findings.
